daily_summary.headline: Starship Test Flight and Aurora Opportunities

top_events.title: Starship | Flight 12
top_events.description: 12th test flight of the two-stage Starship launch vehicle. Maiden Flight of Starship V3.
top_events.action: Watch live for a historic test flight.

top_events.title: Vega-C | Solar wind Magnetosphere Ionosphere Link Explorer (SMILE)
top_events.description: Joint mission between ESA and the Chinese Academy of Sciences to investigate Earth's magnetosphere.
top_events.action: Follow the mission for groundbreaking scientific insights.

top_events.title: Aurora Viewing Opportunity
top_events.description: G1 level aurora forecasted with Kp 4.67 at 18:00 UTC on May 16.
top_events.action: Check the skies at high latitudes for potential aurora.

opportunities.recommendation: Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
